expected.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE signup_at >= date_trunc('month', now())

actual.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_signups FROM customers WHERE signup_at >= '2026-04-01' AND signup_at < '2026-05-01' LIMIT 1000

expected.sql: SELECT name, email FROM customers WHERE is_vip = true

actual.sql: SELECT id, name, email, city, is_vip FROM customers WHERE is_vip = true LIMIT 1000

expected.sql: SELECT name, stock FROM products WHERE stock = 0

actual.sql: SELECT id, name, price, stock FROM products WHERE stock = 0 LIMIT 1000

expected.sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY product_count DESC

actual.sql: SELECT c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.name LIMIT 1000

expected.sql: SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM customers GROUP BY city ORDER BY cnt DESC

actual.sql: SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY city LIMIT 1000

expected.sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'

actual.sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS total_order_amount FROM orders LIMIT 1000

results.question: 지난 30일간 주문이 가장 많은 고객 5명

expected.sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days' GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5

actual.sql: SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.created_at >= (DATE '2026-04-27' - INTERVAL '30 days') GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5

errors: UNKNOWN_COLUMN: Column order_count not in any referenced table

expected.sql: SELECT c.name, o.id, o.total, o.created_at FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE c.is_vip = true ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 10

actual.sql: SELECT c.id AS customer_id, c.name AS customer_name, c.city AS customer_city, o.id AS order_id, o.status AS order_status, o.total AS order_total, o.created_at AS order_created_at FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE c.is_vip = true ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 1000

results.question: Electronics 카테고리 상품의 평균 평점을 알려줘

expected.sql: SELECT AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON p.id = r.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE c.name = 'Electronics'

actual.sql: SELECT AVG(r.rating) AS average_rating FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.id = p.category_id JOIN reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id WHERE c.name = 'Electronics' LIMIT 1000

results.question: 지난 분기 매출 상위 고객 10명과 그 매출액을 알려줘

expected.sql: SELECT c.name, SUM(o.total) AS revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.created_at >= date_trunc('quarter', now()) - interval '3 months' AND o.created_at < date_trunc('quarter', now()) AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

results.question: 카테고리별 매출 합계를 매출이 높은 순으로

expected.sql: SELECT c.name, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY revenue DESC

actual.sql: SELECT c.name AS category_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.id = p.category_id JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1000

errors: UNKNOWN_COLUMN: Column total_sales not in any referenced table

results.question: 월별 주문 수와 전월 대비 증감을 알려줘

expected.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT date_trunc('month', created_at) AS m, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders GROUP BY 1) SELECT m, cnt, cnt - LAG(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY m) AS delta FROM monthly ORDER BY m

actual.sql:
WITH monthly_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS order_count
    FROM orders
    WHERE status = 'completed'
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
)
SELECT 
    month,
    order_count,
    LAG(order_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN LAG(order_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((order_count - LAG(order_count) OVER (ORDER BY month)) * 100.0 / LAG(order_count) OVER (ORDER BY month), 2)
    END AS growth_rate_pct
FROM monthly_orders
ORDER BY month
LIMIT 1000

errors: UNKNOWN_TABLE: Table not in catalog: monthly_orders
UNKNOWN_COLUMN: Column month not in any referenced table
UNKNOWN_COLUMN: Column order_count not in any referenced table

results.question: 각 고객의 첫 구매 일자와 평균 주문 금액

expected.sql: SELECT c.name, MIN(o.created_at) AS first_order, AVG(o.total) AS avg_total FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name

actual.sql: SELECT c.name AS customer_name, MIN(o.created_at) AS first_purchase_date, AVG(o.total) AS average_order_amount FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY first_purchase_date LIMIT 1000

errors: UNKNOWN_COLUMN: Column first_purchase_date not in any referenced table

expected.sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '30 days' AND status = 'completed'

actual.sql: SELECT SUM(o.total) AS total_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS customer_count FROM orders o WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.created_at <= '2026-04-27' LIMIT 1000

results.question: How many products are out of stock?

expected.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE stock = 0

actual.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS out_of_stock_count FROM products WHERE stock = 0 LIMIT 1000

expected.sql: SELECT status, AVG(total) AS avg_total, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders GROUP BY status

actual.sql: SELECT status, AVG(total) AS avg_order_value FROM orders GROUP BY status LIMIT 1000

results.question: Top 5 best-selling products by quantity sold

expected.sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_qty FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5

actual.sql: SELECT p.id, p.name AS product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_qty FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5

errors: UNKNOWN_COLUMN: Column total_qty not in any referenced table

results.question: Customers in Seoul who placed more than 3 orders this year

expected.sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.id) AS cnt FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.city = 'Seoul' AND o.created_at >= date_trunc('year', now()) GROUP BY c.id, c.name HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 3

actual.sql: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, c.city, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE c.city = 'Seoul' AND o.created_at >= '2026-01-01' GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.email, c.city HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 3 LIMIT 1000

results.question: Products with average rating above 4 and at least 3 reviews

expected.sql: SELECT p.name, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(r.id) AS review_count FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON r.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name HAVING COUNT(r.id) >= 3 AND AVG(r.rating) > 4 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

actual.sql: SELECT p.id, p.name, AVG(r.rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(r.id) as review_count FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name HAVING AVG(r.rating) > 4 AND COUNT(r.id) >= 3 LIMIT 1000

expected.sql: SELECT id, customer_id, status, total, created_at FROM orders ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

actual.sql: SELECT o.id, o.customer_id, c.name AS customer_name, o.created_at, o.status, o.total FROM orders o LEFT JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id LIMIT 1000
